programme.title: France 24 English News
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: Pitino: Red Storm Rising
programme.desc: An unexpected detour leads to another championship for Rick Pitino. A St. John's alum gives back to the program while one of Coach's favourite players follows him to Queens.

programme.title: Pitino: Red Storm Rising
programme.desc: The Red Storm are taking over New York as the Big East Tournament begins. Rick reflects on the start of his career and a key transfer cherishes his second chance on the court.

programme.title: Inside the Huddle
programme.desc: What is it like to be a footballer? Candid conversations, laughs, and insights that go beyond the game and into the outer.

programme.title: Over the Black Dot
programme.desc: In 2026, Over the Black Dot becomes a digital-first Rugby League yarn free-flowing conversations on footy, culture and community, with panellists and guests sharing authentic Indigenous stories.

programme.title: Stories From The Cities
programme.desc: Stories from the Cities journeys across Canada, Mexico, and the United States, exploring the host cities of the FIFA World Cup 2026. In this episode, we discover the footballing spirit of Guadalajara through its people, neighbourhoods, culture, and the everyday moments that define the city.

programme.title: BBC News at Ten
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: France 24 International News
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: PBS News Compass Points
programme.desc: Join PBS News Hour's Nick Schifrin and a panel of experts each week analysing prominent international affairs topics and America's role in a shifting world, breaking down global conflicts, rising tensions, and their implications for U.S. interests.

programme.title: Al Jazeera News Viceland Afternoon
programme.desc: News via satellite from Al Jazeera Satellite Network, Qatar, in English.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: Excitement abounds as the team is poised to raise the massive boulder on Lot 8. And in the swamp, a shocking artifact is discovered that suggests a connection to the American Revolution.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts a brand-new episode of 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown. Jonathan Ross and Russell Kane take on Alan Carr and Judi Love in the classic words and numbers quiz.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Star Wars
programme.desc: After more than a decade on ice, Star Wars returned with impossible expectations. Can this new Star Wars trilogy recreate the original magic without his partner Marcia at his side?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Star Wars
programme.sub-title: Attack Of The Clones/Revenge Of The Sith
programme.desc: With The Phantom Menace leaving many fans cold, Lucas was at his lowest with two more films still to be made. Would he lose the dedication of his fervent fan base?

programme.title: Rock Legends
programme.desc: Looks at the life and music of Tina Turner and the impact she made on popular culture. Using interviews, news archive and performance, the program follows Tina's story as she rose to fame in the 1960s alongside then-husband Ike Turner, before enjoying a highly successful solo career.

programme.title: The Verdict
programme.desc: Has Shohei Ohtani become a greater baseball player than Babe Ruth? The Verdict decides.

programme.title: Dark Side of the Ring
programme.desc: Brutus 'The Barber' Beefcake's path in the wrestling world was defined by his decades-long friendship with Hulk Hogan and a horrifying accident that almost took his life.

programme.title: Dark Side of the Ring
programme.sub-title: The Life and Legends of Harley Race
programme.desc: Harley Race achieved near mythical status for wrestling fans as the ultimate tough guy, but behind closed doors his life was haunted by violence and unimaginable personal tragedy.

programme.title: NHK World English News
programme.desc: English news from Japan's Broadcasting Corporation, NHK, delivering the latest in business, technology, health, environmental and world news.

programme.title: Al Jazeera News Hour
programme.desc: In-depth global news from Al Jazeera Satellite Network, Doha, Qatar, in English.

programme.title: TRT World News
programme.desc: The latest news from around the globe from TRT World, Istanbul, Turkiye, in English.

programme.title: Indian Country Today News
programme.desc: An independent news channel that serves Indigenous communities with news, entertainment, and opinion.

programme.title: FBC News Fiji
programme.desc: Local, world, sport and entertainment news in English from FBC News, Suva Fiji.

programme.title: France 24 Feature
programme.desc: News feature in English from France 24, Paris.

programme.title: euronews
programme.desc: Headlines, Breaking News & Analysis from the Euronews news centre in Brussels, Belgium, in English.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: English news from Japan's Broadcasting Corporation, NHK, delivering the latest in business, technology, health, environmental and world news.

programme.title: CBC The National
programme.desc: CBC's flagship nightly news with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang from Toronto, Canada. Watch on SBS VICELAND at 08:40am everyday, also available on SBS OnDemand.

programme.title: BBC News At Six
programme.desc: The latest national and international news stories from the BBC News team from London, UK, in English.

programme.title: France 24 English News
programme.desc: International news and current affairs television from Paris, offering a French perspective on world events, in English.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw Bitesize
programme.desc: Join host Adam Liaw and all your favourite chefs, cooks and celebrities for the best bits from The Cook Up kitchen.

programme.title: NITV News Update
programme.desc: NITV News recaptures the highlights of Indigenous news around the country.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: Ken Jennings hosts Jeopardy! Where the answers are revealed and the contestants must guess the appropriate questions.

programme.title: DW The Day
programme.desc: DW The Day is a news show that helps you understand emerging stories from Europe, the US and across the globe, in English, no subtitles.

programme.title: The Fifth Element
programme.desc: New York, the twenty-third century. The Earth is about to be destroyed by a huge ball of fire racing toward the planet. Cornelius, an old monk, knows how to stop the burning sphere: the Fifth Element, the Supreme Being, who unites the four basic Elements -- air, water, fire and earth -- must be summoned for it is the only being who can stop Evil. Cornelius, with help from Korben Dallas a taxi driver and former secret agent, and Leeloo an alien in the shape of a beautiful, orange haired woman, set off on a myriad of adventures in an attempt to save humanity and fight the horrendous Zorg.

programme.title: The Fifth Element
programme.desc: New York, the twenty-third century. The Earth is about to be destroyed by a huge ball of fire racing toward the planet. Cornelius, an old monk, knows how to stop the burning sphere: the Fifth Element, the Supreme Being, who unites the four basic Elements -- air, water, fire and earth -- must be summoned for it is the only being who can stop Evil. Cornelius, with help from Korben Dallas a taxi driver and former secret agent, and Leeloo an alien in the shape of a beautiful, orange haired woman, set off on a myriad of adventures in an attempt to save humanity and fight the horrendous Zorg.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: Film review with Margaret Pomeranz and David Stratton. Covers Rich in Love, Cageman, Mr Saturday Night, Blast 'Em, and Bad Lieutenant with Abel Ferrara interview.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: Film review with Margaret Pomeranz and David Stratton. Covers School Ties, Super Mario Bros., Melbourne Film Festival report, Aladdin, Made in America, and Last Hero in China.

programme.title: The Movie Show
programme.desc: Film review with Margaret Pomeranz and David Stratton. Covers Silver, Hellraiser III, Sydney Film Festival report, Sweet Emma, Dear Bobe, Untamed Heart, with filmmaker interviews.

programme.title: DW The Day
programme.desc: DW The Day is a news show that helps you understand emerging stories from Europe, the US and across the globe, in English, no subtitles.

programme.title: The Greatest Show On Earth
programme.desc: Join Claudio Fabiano and Adamo De Nigris for the Greatest Show on Earth - as the team analyse and bring you all the latest on the FIFA World Cup 2026 groups.

programme.title: The Greatest Show On Earth
